author: dev-priya
description: Migrate JWT signing algorithm from HS256 to RS256 for auth-service tokens
diff_summary: Replaces HS256 (symmetric HMAC) with RS256 (asymmetric RSA) for JWT signing. New private key stored in HashiCorp Vault. Public key distributed to all verifying services via key-rotation endpoint. Rollout uses dual-signing: new tokens are RS256, old HS256 tokens accepted for 7-day grace period. No user action required.
rollback_plan: Revert jwt_config.yaml to HS256. HS256 verification kept active during grace period. Rollback is safe within 7-day window.
